summary: Tested frame color customization feature on Profile page. Backend API and Frontend UI both working correctly. User can select from 6 colors (lime, cyan, purple, amber, rose, rainbow) and save changes.

backend_api: All 6 valid colors work: lime, cyan, purple, amber, rose, rainbow
Invalid colors are ignored (API doesn't update if color is invalid)
frontend_features: Login with naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 works correctly
Profile page displays with user info (Liver_97, @_97)
Avatar frame shows with saved color from database
Edit button 'تعديل الملف الشخصي' opens edit mode
Frame color selector label 'لون الإطار' is visible
6 color circles displayed for selection (lime, cyan, purple, amber, rose, rainbow)
Color name displayed below selector in Arabic
Save button 'حفظ' saves changes to database
After save, frame color updates to new selection

feature_verified.description: Users can customize their profile avatar frame color by selecting from 6 predefined colors

critical_code_review_comments: FRAME_COLORS object in ProfilePage.js defines all 6 colors with gradients and Arabic labels
GlowingAvatar component accepts frameColor prop and applies correct gradient
FrameColorSelector component renders 6 color buttons with selection indicator
Backend validates frame_color against valid_colors list before saving
frame_color field properly stored in MongoDB and returned in /auth/me endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frame color customization feature tested and working. Components: 1) FRAME_COLORS object with 6 colors (lime, cyan, purple, amber, rose, rainbow). 2) GlowingAvatar component with animated gradient frame. 3) FrameColorSelector component with 6 clickable color circles. 4) Backend PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint validates and saves frame_color. 5) GET /api/auth/me returns frame_color. All features working correctly.
